Legal

Terms & Conditions

By placing an order with Antariya, you agree to these terms covering product purchase, payment, shipping, and returns.

All orders are subject to product availability and successful payment authorization.

Product colors may vary slightly due to lighting and screen differences. We make every effort to present products accurately.

Antariya reserves the right to cancel orders in cases of pricing errors, stock mismatch, or suspicious transaction activity.

For order or account-related assistance, contact hello@antariyaofficial.com.
